urdu transliteration text:

@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The one who sacrificed his household to uphold the message of Tawheed,
How did you forget him, oh reciters of the Kalima?
He let himself be beheaded while prostrating, he was…

urdu transliteration text:

@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Bring your dignity to the plains outside; we would never cry
Show off to the world your standards of dignity; we would never cry
The one who gave your pride shame and chastity, he was…

urdu transliteration text:

@HujjatELC
english translation text:
When humanity was struggling to breath, who gave it support?
When the religion of Prophet (saw) was in a helpless state, who gave support?
The one who practised righteousness,  brought back righteousness, he was…

urdu transliteration text:

@HujjatELC
english translation text:

There would no knowledge of Tawheed nor would the reciters of Kalima
The one who gave you Tawheed as a gift, he was…

urdu transliteration text:

@HujjatELC
english translation text:

Everyone would be idol worshippers, there would no monotheism; instead practice of Yazid would be rampant
The one who wiped off the concept of Yazidiyat, he was…

urdu transliteration text:

@HujjatELC
english translation text:

The enemies of the Islam and the family of the Prophet; what religion is this?
The one who removed the veil over the wrong doings, he was…
